steps.title: Identify the singular subject
steps.content: ”The sculpture” is the subject of the sentence, and it's singular — one object.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match the subject's number. “Stands” is the only singular present-tense form. The other three options use plural verbs or auxiliaries (were, have, are), violating subject-verb agreement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
